title: Chat
groupSetupRequired: Sign in to participate in group conversations.
groupParticipantsEmpty: Participants will appear here once the group is selected.
groupSettingsCollapsedSummary: Group actions and settings stay docked here.
groupSettingsEmpty: This mode does not expose extra settings yet.
groupAddAgentError: Failed to add agent to the group
groupRemoveAgentError: Failed to remove agent from the group
groupComposerWithAgents: Type a message... Use @ to mention an agent
createGroupDescription: Add a title and select members to start a group conversation.
selectConversation: Select a conversation to start chatting.
aiEmptyDescription: Create a thread with the current AI route and keep drafts, messages, and route bindings in the desktop-owned store.
aiTranscriptEmpty: Send a message to start this conversation.
nimiTranscriptEmpty: Send a message to start this conversation.
aiRouteUnavailable: The saved AI route is no longer ready. Pick one of the ready routes on the right to continue.
aiRouteRequired: Configure a local chat route or a healthy cloud connector before AI mode can open a conversation.
nimiRouteRequired: Configure a local chat route or a healthy cloud connector before Nimi Chat can open a conversation.
aiSubmitMissingThread: Select a conversation before sending a message.
aiSubmitRouteUnavailable: Choose a ready AI route before sending a message.
nimiSubmitRouteUnavailable: Choose a ready Nimi route before sending a message.
aiStatusFallback: Select a thread or start a new one.
aiSettingsCollapsedSummary: Model and diagnostics stay docked here when you need them.
agentComposerNoTargetPlaceholder: Select an agent to start chatting...
agentTranscriptEmpty: Say hello, ask a question, or start with whatever is on your mind.
agentTranscriptEmptyTitle: Say hello when you are ready
agentEmptyDescription: Pick one of your agent friends from the left. Each agent keeps a single desktop-owned local conversation.
agentNoTargetsDescription: Agent mode only uses your current agent friends as local chat targets.
agentRouteRequired: Agent mode requires a local or cloud runtime route. Configure one in runtime settings.
agentSubmitMissingThread: Select an agent friend before sending a message.
agentSubmitRouteUnavailable: A local or cloud runtime route is required before sending a message.
agentTargetMissing: The selected agent friend is no longer available.
agentAttachmentImageOnly: Agent chat currently supports image attachments only.
avatarSummarySubtitle: Review avatar model status, open this chat in Nimi Avatar, and adjust local shell appearance here.
avatarCardSubtitle: Open settings to manage this agent's model, diagnostics, and avatar controls.
agentSettingsCollapsedSummary: Avatar controls and diagnostics stay docked here.
agentPresenceCardSubtitle: Status and conversation controls for this agent on this device.
agentDiagnosticsAutonomyOnDetail: Disable autonomy when you want chat-only behavior without life-track execution.
agentDiagnosticsAutonomyOffDetail: Enable autonomy when this agent should resume runtime-owned life-track behavior.
agentDiagnosticsAutonomyOffNeedsModeDeta: Apply a non-off autonomy mode before enabling runtime-owned life-track behavior.
agentDiagnosticsAvatarOverrideDetail: Debug-only override for avatar phase and mood. Does not mutate RuntimeAgent status.
disableAgentAutonomyConfirm: Disable runtime autonomy for {{name}}? Pending hooks remain visible but life-track execution will stop until autonomy is enabled again.
agentRuntimeStateUnchanged: No runtime state changes to apply for {{name}}.
humanSetupRequired: Sign in to continue with human conversations.
humanSettingsCollapsedSummary: Profile, diagnostics, and conversation controls stay docked here.
humanBio: Chat with your friends on Nimi.
aiNoBio: Configure a model to start chatting.
nimiNoBio: Configure a model to start chatting with Nimi.
aiComposerSetupPlaceholder: Set up a model to start chatting...
nimiComposerSetupPlaceholder: Set up a model to start chatting with Nimi...
thinkingTooltipUnsupported: Thinking is not supported by the current route
settingsChatRouteConfigHint: Inspect and switch the runtime-backed route selection used for this conversation.
memoryModeBaselineHint: Canonical memory stays in Baseline until you explicitly bind a local embedding profile.
memoryModeBaselineReadOnlyHint: Canonical memory is currently in Baseline. Cognition settings are read-only here.
memoryModeStandardHint: Canonical memory is bound to the local embedding profile for richer recall.
memoryModeStandardCutoverHint: Canonical memory already has Standard recall, and a new embedding generation is staged for cutover.
memoryModeUnavailableHint: Standard memory is unavailable until the runtime has an active local embedding asset.
upgradeStandardMemoryConfirm: Bind {{name}} canonical memory to this device embedding profile? This is an explicit upgrade from Baseline to Standard memory.
memoryModeUpgradeSuccess: {{name}} now uses Standard memory on this device.
clearAgentChatHistoryHint: Delete all local chat history with this agent on this device.
clearAgentChatHistoryConfirm: Delete all local chat history with {{name}}? This cannot be undone.
agentCenterSubtitle: Configure this agent from chat. Identity and state stay read-only here.
agentCenterConfigureAvatarHint: Configure Avatar in Agent Center before starting.
agentCenterAvatarStartHint: Open this agent in Nimi Avatar.
agentCenterAvatarStartRuntimeUnavailable: Avatar launch requires the desktop Runtime bridge.
agentCenterAvatarStartAccountRequired: Sign in with the Runtime-backed desktop account before opening Avatar.
agentCenterAvatarStartSuccess: Avatar launch requested. Waiting for the avatar to come online.
agentCenterAvatarStartUnconfirmed: Launch request was sent, but the OS did not confirm it.
agentCenterAvatarStopUnconfirmed: Close request was sent, but the OS did not confirm it.
agentCenterAvatarLaunchUnavailableHint: Avatar is configured, but launch controls are not available yet.
agentCenterFixAvatarSetupHint: Avatar setup needs attention before it can start.
agentCenterAvatarPackageReady: A local package is selected and ready to launch from the composer.
agentCenterAvatarPackageNeedsFix: The selected local package needs attention before launch.
agentCenterAvatarPackageMissing: Import a local Live2D folder or VRM file to enable avatar launch.
agentCenterAvatarImportAgentRequired: Select an agent before importing an avatar package.
agentCenterAvatarImportDesktopOnly: Avatar package import is available in the desktop app.
agentCenterAvatarStatusHint: Start and stop belongs in the composer. Setup lives in Appearance.
agentCenterClearHistoryScope: Clears messages shown on this device.
agentCenterBehaviorModeRequired: Choose a non-off mode before enabling.
agentCenterBehaviorModeDirty: Apply the behavior mode before enabling.
agentCenterProactiveOnDesc: Agent reaches out on its own.
agentCenterProactiveOffDesc: Agent only replies when spoken to.
agentCenterAgentSnapshotHint: Identity and state are read-only here.
agentCenterAvatarReadyHint: Avatar setup is present. Launch controls stay in the composer.
agentCenterAppearanceSetupHint: Choose local visual assets and check whether the avatar can launch.
agentCenterLocalAppearanceHint: Stored on this device for this agent.
agentCenterBackgroundReadyHint: A local background is selected for this agent.
agentCenterBackgroundNeedsFix: The selected local background needs attention.
agentCenterBackgroundMissingHint: Import a png, jpeg, or webp image for this agent.
agentCenterBackgroundImportAgentRequired: Select an agent before importing a background.
agentCenterBackgroundScope: Background for this agent on this device.
agentCenterMotionHint: Local motion preferences should respect reduced motion.
agentCenterAutonomyHint: These controls are available only when Agent service exposes them.
agentCenterCognitionV1Hint: V1 shows status only unless Agent service exposes a control.
agentCenterAdvancedWarnBody: These controls are intended for development. Changes can desync runtime state — proceed with care.
agentCenterSharedModelConfigDesc: This agent uses the workspace's default routing.
agentCenterHeroAllReadyDesc: Setup is complete. You can speak with this agent now.
profileNoPublicBio: This Agent has no public bio.
profileRelationshipHint: The current interaction tone and bond strength.
profileClearHistoryHint: Remove the conversation transcript for this target.
profileMemoryHint: Local memory state for this target.
parityHarnessSubtitle: Canonical chat shell variants rendered side by side with one deterministic fixture.
parityFixtureLanBio: Keeps the tea hot and the room calm.
parityFixtureFriendBio: Always replies from the shared parity harness.
parityFixtureAssistantBio: Synthetic route-backed target for AI parity.
parityHistoryIntro: Your earlier conversation is still here. The next reply will continue from this point.
parityVoiceTranscript: I am the one who works on Mount Lingtai.
parityPresenceHint: Runtime-backed setting wired through the parity fixture.
parityMemoryEmpty: This Agent has no long-term memory stored in the parity fixture.
parityRuntimeStatusHint: Following the local runtime default for this parity fixture.
parityMediaSummary: Media route unresolved in parity fixture
parityMediaDisabledReason: No media route bound for the deterministic fixture.
parityDiagnosticsSummary: No prompt trace captured for the deterministic fixture.
parityDiagnosticsDisabledReason: Diagnostics are intentionally idle in this parity capture.
parityVoiceRouteReady: Warm Cedar · Local voice route ready
settingsSttTranscribeHint: Controls the route used when the conversation transcribes voice input to text.
settingsEmbedHint: Controls the route used to produce text embeddings for retrieval or memory features.
imageParamCustomOptionsHint: One option per line. Example: diffusion_model
settingsChatModelHint: AI model used for this conversation. Follows Runtime default unless overridden.
settingsLocalUnavailable: Local model discovery failed. Runtime may be unavailable.
settingsNoLocalModels: No local models available for this capability.
settingsSelectConnector: Select a connector to see available models.
settingsNoCloudModels: No models available for this connector.
settingsSavedRouteUnavailable: Saved route is no longer available.
settingsThinkingHint: Enable model thinking when the current route supports separate reasoning output.
settingsThinkingReadyHint: This route can stream the model thought process separately from the final answer.
settingsThinkingFallbackHint: Thinking is unavailable for the current route.
settingsThinkingUnsupportedNoRoute: Choose a ready route before enabling thinking.
settingsThinkingUnsupportedLocalRoute: Managed local llama routes do not support thinking yet.
settingsThinkingUnsupportedProvider: Only Ollama routes support thinking right now.
settingsThinkingUnsupportedAgentRoute: Agent chat uses the managed local runtime, which does not support thinking yet.
settingsThinkingUnsupportedMetadata: Route policy metadata is unavailable, so thinking stays off.
settingsThinkingUnsupportedTraceMode: This route does not expose separate thinking traces.
settingsThinkingUnsupportedCapability: This route does not support thinking output.
settingsVoiceHint: Review voice playback, transcript visibility, and route readiness for this conversation.
voiceSessionHandsFreeHint: Foreground hands-free stays inside this thread only.
voiceSessionTargetRequired: Select an agent before starting voice input.
voiceSessionAnchorRequired: Voice input is unavailable because the conversation anchor is not ready.
voiceSessionAnchorChanged: Voice input stopped because the conversation anchor changed.
voiceSessionRouteRequired: Voice input is unavailable because no transcribe route is configured.
voiceSessionRuntimeUnavailable: Voice input is unavailable because the transcribe runtime is not ready.
voiceSessionRouteUnavailable: Voice input is unavailable because the selected transcribe route cannot be resolved.
voiceSessionUnavailable: Voice input is unavailable for the current conversation.
settingsVoiceConversationModeHint: When enabled, upcoming replies stay in a voice session until you turn it off.
settingsAutoPlayVoiceRepliesHint: Automatically play voice beats after they arrive.
settingsVoiceSpeechHint: Controls standard text-to-speech playback for the conversation.
settingsVoiceCloneHint: Independent route for voice-to-voice generation. Does not inherit speech synthesis automatically.
settingsVoiceDesignHint: Independent route for text-to-voice design. Does not inherit speech synthesis automatically.
settingsVisualsHint: Control whether images and videos appear in conversation, and their content style.
settingsImageGenerateHint: Controls the route used when the conversation generates images.
settingsImageEditHint: Independent route for edit-style image operations.
settingsVideoGenerateHint: Controls the route used when the conversation generates videos.
settingsPresenceHint: Control whether this conversation may proactively re-enter the room.
settingsDiagnosticsHint: Inspect route, runtime, and conversation health details for the current chat.
settingsAllowProactiveContactHint: Unavailable until runtime inspect is connected for this source.
settingsCapabilityDeniedHint: The host denied this capability for the current conversation surface.
settingsCapabilityUnsupportedHint: The current runtime does not expose this capability.
settingsSelectedRouteUnavailableHint: The selected route can no longer be resolved.
settingsRouteUnhealthyHint: The selected route failed the latest health check.
settingsRouteMetadataUnavailableHint: This capability cannot execute until runtime describe metadata is available.
settingsImageProfileHint: Selects the local asset bundle for image capabilities within the current AI configuration.
settingsExternalImageProfileHint: The selected profile is managed outside core runtime and is referenced by id only.
settingsImageProfileUnsetHint: Select a profile to enable image.generate and image.edit capabilities.
settingsNoImageProfiles: No image profiles are published by core runtime.
settingsUnavailableReason: This source does not expose agent chat runtime inspect yet.
runtimeInspectSubtitle: Route, voice, media, and diagnostics for this conversation.
schedulingQueueRequiredDetail: All scheduler slots are occupied. Your request will be queued. {{detail}}
schedulingPreemptionRiskDetail: Running tasks may be degraded by concurrent execution. {{detail}}
schedulingSlowdownRiskDetail: Device resources are constrained. Execution may be slower than usual. {{detail}}
schedulingSlowdownRiskBusyDetail: Local executions are already using device resources. New execution may be slower until current work finishes. {{detail}}
schedulingUnknownDetail: The scheduler cannot fully evaluate execution feasibility. {{detail}}
voiceInspectHint: Playback and transcript controls for the selected voice beat.
voiceInspectTranscriptHint: Voice transcripts stay hidden until you explicitly reveal them.
voiceInspectTranscriptHidden: Transcript is hidden until you reveal it.
voiceInspectTranscriptUnavailable: No transcript available for this voice beat.
